titles.title: Do They See Jesus in Me?

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Is the face that I see in the mirror, The one I want others to see, Do I show in the way that I walk in my life, The love that You've shown me, My heart's desire is to be like You, In all that I do, all I am.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Do they see Jesus in me? Do they recognize Your face? Do I communicate Your love and Your grace? Do I reflect who You are In the way I choose to be? Do they see Jesus in me?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It's amazing that You'd ever use me, But use me the way You will, Help me to hold out a heart of compassionate grace, A heart that You're spirit fills, May I show forgiveness and mercy, The same way you've shown it to me.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Now I want to show all the world who You are, The reason I live and breathe, So You'll be the One that they see, When they see me.
